name: copilot-local-adapter
description: Standalone GitHub Copilot CLI adapter reconstructed from the Paperclip copilot_local session.

scripts.smoke: node ./bin/copilot-local.js --cwd D:\Github\copilot-sdk --prompt "Reply with the single word: hello"
scripts.check: node --check ./src/auth.js && node --check ./src/index.js && node --check ./src/login.js && node --check ./src/models.js && node --check ./src/parse.js && node --check ./bin/copilot-local.js
